steps.title: Use Tom's reaction
steps.content: Tom's mood changes after he takes in the fence's size: thirty yards long and nine feet high. The word describes the act that lets him recognize the size of the task.

steps.title: Match the visual action
steps.content: A suggests uncertainty, B suggests interest, and D means commanded. In context, Tom visually examines the fence and reacts to what he sees. The answer is C.
